Petition By Claimant To Determine Ownership Of Estate Property And For Order Authorizing And Directing Executor To Transfer Estate Property To Petitioner Upon Distribution Of Decedent'S Estate
Off Calendar Jul-27-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Vincent Yu appeared by zoom for Gisela Hewitt (Beneficiary).

The Court noted that no one else is present. Mr. Yu stated that he believes Glendale Federal Bank was purchased by Citibank in 2012, that prior to that Glendale Bank changed hands a few times, that he is fairly confident that the account numbers match, that obtaining bank statements falls under an Administrator and that his firm does not represent the Client in that capacity. The Court granted the Petition by Claimant to Determine Ownership of Estate Property and for Order Authorizing and Directing Executor to transfer Estate Property to Petitioner Upon Distribution of Decedent's estate (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: K. Cabasares. Not reported.
